title: Kale Consultants is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kale Consultants is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kale Consultants family as a Full Stack Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
